raw_text:
<think>
The user asks: "packet_id=SFFRESCUE-14215D811CC1FAE00426
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
Return the three-line status record."

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They already provided those values. So output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

But they also mention "packet_id=SFFRESCUE-14215D811CC1FAE00426". The user asks: "Return the three-line status record." The given packet_id may be just context, not needed for the output. The output should be just three lines. No headings, no extra lines. So we will output exactly the three lines.

Thus: 
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra whitespace. Use exactly the format. That's it.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
